CustomField.description: Should Rent be billed for a partial period, the Pro-Rata Number of Days can be calculated based on Actual number of days in the month/year, or Fixed 30/360.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Should Rent be billed for a partial period, the Pro-Rata Number of Days can be calculated based on Actual number of days in the month/year, or Fixed 30/360.
CustomField.label: Pro-Rata Number Of Days

value.fullName: Actual number of days in month/year
value.label: Actual number of days in month/year
